message:
feat(ext4): replace u32 feature flag constants with typed structs and add Ext4InodeNumber/BtrfsObjectId wrappers

- Introduce Ext4CompatFeatures, Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4RoCompatFeatures typed structs
  replacing raw u32 bitfield constants for compile-time safety
- Add cluster_size and clusters_per_group fields to superblock parsing
- Add Ext4InodeNumber(u32) and BtrfsObjectId(u64) newtype wrappers with
  round-trip conversion tests in ffs-types (bd-1ds)
- Update public exports in ffs-ondisk/src/lib.rs for new feature flag types

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
